name: Cannoli Snacks
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cinnamon or cocoa powder, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, confectioners' sugar, and grated orange peel.
2. Spread about one teaspoon of the mixture onto each melba round.
3. Sprinkle the cinnamon or cocoa powder over the top of each serving.
4. Serve and enjoy.
Makes 50 servings. Preparation time: About 10 minutes.
